activation_conditions: npm run validate passes or failing unrelated validators are explicitly recorded
public deployment verification is ready or complete

downstream_targets.required_action: mirror public summary after wiki validation and repo-standards tag/release
publication/import awareness after wiki validation and repo-standards tag/release
downstream public Guardian summary after wiki validation and repo-standards tag/release
private Guardian implementation standing-boundary awareness after wiki validation

required_preflight_for_each_target: treat target handoff as local source of truth
record whether release reference is already present
do not infer target destination from memory alone
do not treat mirror visibility as runtime authority
non_claims: downstream mirror activation is not deployment authority
guardian summary is not private implementation standing
